description: Creating evidence matrix visualization for the hypothesis evaluation
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib
matplotlib.rcParams['font.size'] = 9

# Evidence matrix data
evidence_data = [
    # (PMID, Type, Support, Claim, Key Finding, Context, Confidence)
    ("8393475
(1993)", "Model
organism", "SUPPORT", "Beta subunit is critical
T-cell target", "Thymic beta expression
prevents disease", "Neonatal
thymectomy", "HIGH"),
    ("8759770
(1996)", "Model
organism", "SUPPORT", "CD4 T cells mediate
disease via H/K ATPase", "H/K ATPase-reactive CD4+
cells in gastric LN", "d3Tx
BALB/c", "HIGH"),
    ("11449363
(2001)", "Model
organism", "SUPPORT", "CD4 T cells sufficient
for disease", "TxA23 transgenic: 100%
penetrance AIG", "TCR
transgenic", "HIGH"),
    ("16237067
(2005)", "Model
organism", "QUALIFIES", "Alpha thymic expression
tolerizes", "Alpha mRNA does NOT
negatively select", "Overexpression
study", "HIGH"),
    ("14568977
(2003)", "Human
clinical", "COMPETING", "Disease independent
of infection", "Cross-reactive T cells
for H. pylori & H/K ATPase", "H. pylori+
patients", "HIGH"),
    ("35226043
(2022)", "Model
organism", "QUALIFIES", "Primary central
tolerance origin", "Roseolovirus disrupts
thymic tolerance → AIG", "Neonatal
MRV", "HIGH"),
    ("34755133
(2021)", "Human
clinical", "COMPETING", "Disease requires central
tolerance defect", "Anti-PD1 causes AIG
via peripheral loss", "ICI-treated
cancer", "MOD"),
    ("27259856
(2016)", "Model
organism", "SUPPORT", "Treg loss enables
disease", "Transient Treg depletion
→ long-lasting AIG", "DEREG
mice", "HIGH"),
    ("18641328
(2008)", "Model
organism", "QUALIFIES", "Th1-mediated
disease", "Th1/Th2/Th17 all cause
AIG; Th17 most destructive", "TxA23
transfer", "HIGH"),
    ("34145262
(2021)", "Human
GWAS", "SUPPORT", "Autoimmune genetic
basis", "PTPN22, HLA loci
for pernicious anemia", "Population
biobanks", "HIGH"),
    ("41198445
(2026)", "Human
consensus", "SUPPORT", "H/K ATPase is main
autoantigen", "ARIOSO: ATP4B is main
autoantigen", "Italian
network", "HIGH"),
    ("35911678
(2022)", "Human
clinical", "SUPPORT", "Gastric Th17 target
H/K ATPase in humans", "H/K ATPase-specific
Th17 cells in AIG mucosa", "Human
AIG", "HIGH"),
]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16, 10))
ax.axis('off')

# Create table
columns = ['PMID
(Year)', 'Evidence
Type', 'Supports/
Refutes', 'Claim
Tested', 'Key
Finding', 'Disease
Context', 'Confidence']

cell_text = []
cell_colors = []
for row in evidence_data:
    cell_text.append(list(row))
    support = row[2]
    if support == "SUPPORT":
        cell_colors.append(['#d4edda']*7)
    elif support == "COMPETING":
        cell_colors.append(['#f8d7da']*7)
    elif support == "QUALIFIES":
        cell_colors.append(['#fff3cd']*7)
    else:
        cell_colors.append(['#ffffff']*7)

table = ax.table(cellText=cell_text, colLabels=columns, cellColours=cell_colors,
                 colColours=['#343a40']*7, loc='center', cellLoc='center')

# Style header
for (row, col), cell in table.get_celld().items():
    if row == 0:
        cell.set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold', fontsize=8)
        cell.set_height(0.06)
    else:
        cell.set_text_props(fontsize=7)
        cell.set_height(0.075)
    cell.set_edgecolor('#dee2e6')

table.auto_set_column_width(col=list(range(7)))

plt.title('Evidence Matrix: Canonical Primary Autoimmunity Against H+/K+ ATPase
'
          '(Green=Support, Yellow=Qualifies, Red=Competing)', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', pad=20)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('evidence_matrix.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence matrix saved.")
